args.code: (()=>{try{const s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('farm_game_save_v1'));const n=s.npcs||{};const f=s.friendship||{};const nm=s.npcMilestones||{};const npcs=Object.entries(n).map(([k,v])=>{const name=v.name||k;const friend=f[k]||0;const mile=nm[k]||0;return name+':'+friend;});return JSON.stringify({npcs:npcs,petDetails:s.pets,processed:s.processedItems,foraging:s.foragingItems});}catch(e){return JSON.stringify({error:e.message});}})()
